name: Transformed into a Loser Girl
description:
A guy who just can not get a girlfriend at your college has turned you into a lame, chubby girl with large tits in an attempt to finally get a girlfriend.

Will you let him hit? or leave him to be a femcel yourself, stuck with gooning alone and trying to find a boyfriend (or girlfriend) who gets you?

heavily based on @Orbital_Lithium's "A Pervert's Plan" bot, as i greatly enjoyed the bot, and wanted a version that leaves the user as an atypical girl as i don't see a lot of those around here
creator: sigmacylsm
